name: Cinnamon Twist Coffee Cake1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Instant nonfat dry milk powder
1/4 cup Butter or margarine, softened and divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water; let stand for 5 minutes.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine boiling water, potato flakes, and salt. Beat well with an electric mixer at medium speed.
3. Add 1/2 cup sugar, dry milk powder, and 1/2 cup butter to the mixture. Beat well.
4. Add eggs and yeast mixture; beat well. Gradually beat in 5 cups flour, adding the remaining flour a half cup at a time, and beating well after each addition.
5. Turn dough out onto a heavily floured surface, and knead until smooth and elastic. Place in a greased bowl, turning to grease the top. Cover and let rise in a warm place (85°F), free from drafts, for 1 hour or until doubled in bulk.
6. Punch down the dough, and divide into 6 equal portions. Roll each portion into a 12-inch circle.
7. Place one circle on a lightly greased 12-inch pizza pan. Spread 2 tablespoons butter over the top of the dough, leaving a 1/2-inch margin.
8. Combine 2/3 cup sugar and ground cinnamon; sprinkle about 2-1/2 tablespoons of the cinnamon mixture and 2 tablespoons chopped almonds over the dough.
9. Place a second circle of dough on top of the first. Repeat the process with butter, cinnamon mixture, and almonds.
10. Top with a third circle of dough. Moisten the outer edge of the circle, and seal.
